page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.2xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system architecture is x86_64, supported by a 35 MB L3 cache. It is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks indicate average multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores falling into the middle 50% tier. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and single-threaded gzip compression benchmarks, which rank in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth remains average across both cached small-block reads at 390.01 GB/sec and uncached large-block reads at 49.44 GB/sec. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is also positioned in the bottom 25% tier, while Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput perform at average levels.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute resources without hyperthreading overhead, though the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio limits memory-dense operations. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 2 Gbps. Given the hardware profile and benchmark results, this instance is suited for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage, such as moderate web serving, Redis caching, and standard database operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark data positions its multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations in the average tier, while single-core execution and multi-threaded decompression are relatively weak. With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, this instance offers a balanced profile for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without high memory demands. It is suitable for web serving, Redis caching, and standard database tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core and database benchmark performance.

tagline: A dedicated x86_64 compute instance featuring eight physical Intel Xeon cores and a balanced two-to-one memory-to-CPU ratio.

16.0 GB of system memory with no local storage
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Suited for web serving, Redis caching, and database operations
